detectors.description: MiniMeToken.claimTokens(address) (YOYOW.sol#1255-1275) ignores return value by token.transfer(controller,balance) (YOYOW.sol#1271)
MiniMeToken.isContract(address) (YOYOW.sol#1167-1181) is declared view but contains assembly code
detectors.markdown: [MiniMeToken.isContract(address)](YOYOW.sol#L1167-L1181) is declared view but contains assembly code

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256) (YOYOW.sol#645-681):
	External calls:
	- ! TokenController(controller).onApprove(msg.sender,_spender,_amount) (YOYOW.sol#667)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- allowed[msg.sender][_spender] = _amount (YOYOW.sol#675)
	MiniMeToken.allowed (YOYOW.sol#321) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MiniMeToken.allowance(address,address) (YOYOW.sol#695-701)
	- MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256) (YOYOW.sol#645-681)
	- MiniMeToken.transferFrom(address,address,uint256) (YOYOW.sol#489-519)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256)](YOYOW.sol#L645-L681):
	External calls:
	- [! TokenController(controller).onApprove(msg.sender,_spender,_amount)](YOYOW.sol#L667)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [allowed[msg.sender][_spender] = _amount](YOYOW.sol#L675)
	[MiniMeToken.allowed](YOYOW.sol#L321) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [MiniMeToken.allowance(address,address)](YOYOW.sol#L695-L701)
	- [MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256)](YOYOW.sol#L645-L681)
	- [MiniMeToken.transferFrom(address,address,uint256)](YOYOW.sol#L489-L519)

detectors.description:
MiniMeToken.changeGenerator(address) (YOYOW.sol#441-445) should emit an event for: 
	- generator = _newGenerator (YOYOW.sol#443)

Controlled.changeController(address) (YOYOW.sol#219-223) should emit an event for: 
	- controller = _newController (YOYOW.sol#221)

Reentrancy in MiniMeToken.createCloneToken(string,uint8,string,uint256,bool) (YOYOW.sol#899-943):
	External calls:
	- cloneToken = tokenFactory.createCloneToken(this,_snapshotBlock,_cloneTokenName,_cloneDecimalUnits,_cloneTokenSymbol,_transfersEnabled) (YOYOW.sol#915-929)
	- cloneToken.changeController(msg.sender) (YOYOW.sol#933)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- NewCloneToken(address(cloneToken),_snapshotBlock) (YOYOW.sol#939)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [MiniMeToken.createCloneToken(string,uint8,string,uint256,bool)](YOYOW.sol#L899-L943):
	External calls:
	- [cloneToken = tokenFactory.createCloneToken(this,_snapshotBlock,_cloneTokenName,_cloneDecimalUnits,_cloneTokenSymbol,_transfersEnabled)](YOYOW.sol#L915-L929)
	- [cloneToken.changeController(msg.sender)](YOYOW.sol#L933)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- [NewCloneToken(address(cloneToken),_snapshotBlock)](YOYOW.sol#L939)

	- token.transfer(controller,balance) (YOYOW.sol#1271)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MiniMeToken.doTransfer(address,address,uint256) (YOYOW.sol#535-613):
	External calls:
	- previousBalanceFrom = balanceOfAt(_from,getBlockNumber()) (YOYOW.sol#563)
		- parentToken.balanceOfAt(_owner,min(_blockNumber,parentSnapShotBlock)) (YOYOW.sol#799)
	- ! TokenController(controller).onTransfer(_from,_to,_amount) (YOYOW.sol#577)
	- previousBalanceTo = balanceOfAt(_to,getBlockNumber()) (YOYOW.sol#597)
		- parentToken.balanceOfAt(_owner,min(_blockNumber,parentSnapShotBlock)) (YOYOW.sol#799)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Transfer(_from,_to,_amount) (YOYOW.sol#607)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [MiniMeToken.doTransfer(address,address,uint256)](YOYOW.sol#L535-L613):
	External calls:
	- [previousBalanceFrom = balanceOfAt(_from,getBlockNumber())](YOYOW.sol#L563)
		- [parentToken.balanceOfAt(_owner,min(_blockNumber,parentSnapShotBlock))](YOYOW.sol#L799)
	- [! TokenController(controller).onTransfer(_from,_to,_amount)](YOYOW.sol#L577)
	- [previousBalanceTo = balanceOfAt(_to,getBlockNumber())](YOYOW.sol#L597)
		- [parentToken.balanceOfAt(_owner,min(_blockNumber,parentSnapShotBlock))](YOYOW.sol#L799)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- [Transfer(_from,_to,_amount)](YOYOW.sol#L607)
